videos.title: Teaching Arena Zoomers About Strip Mine  Against the Odds
videos.description:
Wizards put Strip Mine on MTG Arena for some reason, and you know what that means...

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish
